commit.subject: LU-17976 lnet: handle -Werror=missing-prototypes breakage
commit.message:
LU-17976 lnet: handle -Werror=missing-prototypes breakage

The latest gcc version expect you to make functions used only
locally always static otherwise you get a build failure. Fix
the lnet core code so its static.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Fixes: f1c6623 ("LU-10391 lnet: Fault injection add/del ioctls to netlink")
Fixes: 60cea1a ("LU-9680 lnet: Fault injection list ioctls to netlink")
Change-Id: I886f39b8b0b58b768fe60f8eb36a0e26fc9928b2
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
